title: plugin-update config
description: Project-local config for the plugin-update skill. Lives at the repo root as plugin-update.config.json (canonical) or .claude/plugin-update.json (fallback). Committed to git. NOT a refact-os-generated file.

_readme.description: Free-text note. This file is owned by the plugin-update skill, not by refact-os sync.

mode.description: traditional = QA drives the WordPress site directly (single Playwright pass). headless = the frontend is a separate app (e.g. Next.js) QA'd separately.

hosting.description: Hosting provider. Informational — the agent uses it to choose the right cache-bust command (e.g. `kinsta-cache purge`) in the prose steps; no script branches on it.

excludePlugins.description: Plugin slugs that must never be auto-updated (e.g. the custom mu-plugin).

routes.description: Baseline critical routes — screenshotted + HTTP-checked on every update. Human-confirmed in Setup.

path.description: URL path relative to the env url, e.g. '/' or '/?s=the'.

flows.description: Site-specific interactive flows this project HAS, mapped to their URL path. A flow is only checked if declared here, so the skill stays portable. Recognized keys: 'submitEvent' (event-submission form). e.g. { "submitEvent": "/submit-an-event/" }.

maxDiffPixelRatio.description: Playwright toHaveScreenshot threshold (ratio of differing pixels).

masks.description: CSS selectors for dynamic regions to mask (ads, latest-posts sliders, timestamps).

selectors.description: Per-project, theme-specific CSS selectors discovered at Setup (discover-selectors.mjs + human confirm). The interactive/functional specs read EVERY selector from here and SKIP a check when its key is absent — so nothing is hardcoded and an unconfigured site never false-fails. Keep selectors small and specific.

navWrapper.description: Primary nav container — scope for nav link-integrity + dropdown checks.

footer.description: Site footer — scope for footer link-integrity check.

navDropdownToggle.description: Element that opens a nav sub-menu / mega-menu.

navSubmenuContainer.description: The opened sub-menu panel asserted visible after the toggle click.

ctaButton.description: In-page anchor CTA buttons (href^='#') whose targets must resolve.

shareBlock.description: Social-share block container on a single article.

shareControls.description: Share links/buttons inside the share block.

tableOfContents.description: Article table-of-contents container with in-page anchors.

lightboxTrigger.description: Element that opens the image lightbox.

lightboxOverlay.description: The opened lightbox overlay asserted visible.

eventsFilterInput.description: Keyword/filter input on a filtered archive.

eventsListingContainer.description: The listing container that re-renders after filtering.

loadMoreItems.description: Selector for the items inside the load-more wrapper (count grows after click).

newsletterSignup.description: Embedded (often third-party) newsletter form container. Declaring it makes its render a HARD gate.

newsletterEmailField.description: Email input inside the newsletter form (defaults to a generic email-input selector if omitted but newsletterSignup is set).

searchResults.description: Search-results container shown for a matching query.

searchEmptyState.description: No-results element shown for a non-matching query.

hamburgerButton.description: Mobile menu toggle, asserted visible + clicked at phone width.

mobileNavLinks.description: Nav links revealed after opening the mobile menu.

probes.description: Per-project route paths + query terms the interactive/functional probes use. A probe-bound check SKIPS when its key is absent.

searchQuery.description: A term known to return results on this site (search test). e.g. 'the'.

searchNoMatchQuery.description: A nonsense term known to return zero results (search empty-state test). e.g. 'zzqqxnomatch123'.

eventsFilterQuery.description: A keyword typed into the events/archive filter input.

eventsArchivePath.description: Path of the filtered archive the events-filter test loads, e.g. '/events/'.

loadMoreArchivePath.description: Path of an archive that paginates via load-more, e.g. '/category/news/'.

cache.description: Which caches to bust after an update before screenshots.

snapshotDir.description: Gitignored local dir for DB exports taken before updates.

branch.description: Git branch that deploys to this environment (informational).

path.description: WordPress install root on the server.
